use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING DISEASES OR INFECTIONS CAUSED BY MYCETES
ANTIMYCOTIC USES, SPECIFICALLY TREATMENT OF ONYCHOMYCOSIS

indications.text:
Lamisil (terbinafine hydrochloride) Tablets are indicated for the treatment of onychomycosis of the toenail or fingernail
due to dermatophytes (tinea unguium).
Prior to initiating treatment, appropriate nail specimens for laboratory testing (KOH preparation, fungal culture, or nail
biopsy) should be...
